name: SomeIpRemoveFieldFromEventgroup
title: SomeIpRemoveFieldFromEventgroup
syntax: long SomeIpRemoveFieldFromEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pfHandle );
description: Removes a field created by SomeIpAddField from an Event Group which was created by SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup. The field itself is not deleted.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group from which a field should be removed (see SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup).
